# Generated from uv.lock. Do not edit by hand:
#   uv export --no-dev --no-hashes --no-emit-project --format requirements-txt -o requirements.txt
#
# torch is pinned to a CUDA 12.4 build, which does not exist on PyPI; the extra
# index below is what lets `pip install -r requirements.txt` resolve it. Swap
# cu124 for cpu to install a CPU-only build.
#
# uv users should prefer `uv sync`, which reads pyproject.toml and uv.lock.
--extra-index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu124
